name: minni
description: Local-first Minni bridge for Codex with Obsidian vault transparency.

interface.shortDescription: Local recall and Codex-owned Obsidian memory
interface.longDescription: Minni gives Codex transparent local recall, manual vault-first learning, and readable audit logs through a local MCP server. It talks to the existing Minni daemon and keeps expensive extraction out of v1.
defaultPrompt: Learn this in the Codex vault
